zh.Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, U: 英國英格蘭爾麗頓 白 內斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Corbet III於大約1355年出生在英國爾麗頓 白 內斯頓時，他的父親John Corbet II32歲，母親Joan Binweston23歲。他於1385年與Joan Leighton在英國史洛普爾沃拉亞斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1407年在英國英格蘭爾麗頓 白 內斯頓享年53歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾麗頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Corbet III于大约1355年出生在英国爾麗頓 白 內斯頓时，他的父亲John Corbet II32岁，母亲Joan Binweston23岁。他于1385年与Joan Leighton在英国史洛普爾沃拉亞斯頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1407年在英国英格兰爾麗頓 白 內斯頓享年53岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾麗頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Corbet III was born about 1355, in Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, his father, John Corbet II, was 32 and his mother, Joan Binweston, was 23. He married Joan Leighton in 1385, in Wollaston, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1407, in Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Corbet III est né environ 1355, à Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John Corbet II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan Binweston, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joan Leighton en 1385, à Wollaston, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1407, à Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, U: Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John de Corbet III um 1355 in Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Corbet II 32 und seine Mutter Joan Binweston 23. Er hat 1385 in Wollaston, Shropshire, England Joan Leighton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1407 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Joan Leighton nel 1385, nel Wollaston, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1407, nel Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Corbet IIIが約1355年にイギリスチェシュアイアレイトン ビー ネストンで生まれた時，父John Corbet IIは32歳，母Joan Binwestonは23歳であった。1385年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウオラストンでJoan Leightonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1407年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアレイトン ビー ネストンで53歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアレイトンにて埋葬された。

ko.Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, U: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 레이턴 비 네스턴
ko.lifeSummary: John de Corbet III(이)가 대략 1355년 영국 체실르 레이턴 비 네스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Corbet II(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Binweston(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1385년 영국 슈럽실르 울라스턴에서 Joan Leighton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1407년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 레이턴 비 네스턴에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 레이턴에 묻혔다.

pt.Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, U: Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Corbet III nasceu aproximadamente 1355, em Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Corbet II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joan Binweston, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Leighton em 1385, em Wollaston, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1407, em Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, U: лиитон би нестон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Corbet III родился около 1355 г. в местности лиитон би нестон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Corbet II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Binweston, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Leighton в 1385 г. в местности волластон, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1407 г. в местности лиитон би нестон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности лиитон, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Corbet III nació aproximadamente 1355, en Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Corbet II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Joan Binweston, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Joan Leighton en 1385, en Wollaston, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1407, en Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
